title: The Foundation
intro: Welcome! Today we build your palace. Just 3 items.

title: The Expansion
intro: Welcome back! Let's clear out yesterday's items and add 2 new spots.

title: The Reverse
intro: Today is tricky. We're going to recall them backwards!

title: The Stretch
intro: You're doing great. Let's push to 8 items.

title: The Graduation
intro: The final test. 10 items, backwards and forwards.
